description: §41.14.1 — a <formFor> element WITHOUT importing formFor from scrml:data fires E-FORMFOR-NOT-IMPORTED (a registered structural element with no legitimate non-L22 meaning is NOT silently forwarded to codegen as a literal tag).
rationale: §41.14.1 (S183): a <formFor> present without ${ import { formFor } from 'scrml:data' } is a hard error E-FORMFOR-NOT-IMPORTED, symmetric with tableFor's E-TABLEFOR-NOT-IMPORTED — never a silent literal-tag drop.
